name: Why Aberdeen Is Following Consumer PC Deals — DCT Practice Methodology
description: Methodology paper explaining Aberdeen's Digital Consumer Technology practice approach to weekly consumer PC price tracking. Defines the research questions, six tracked brands (Compaq, Dell, eMachines, Gateway, HP, Sony), an 8-factor price-value hierarchy (CPU, memory, modem/NIC, HDD, monitor, OS, printer, software), and weekly commentary format. Acknowledges 90 days of prior tracking; explicitly excludes Apple (no head-to-head competition).
